audit_items.proof_trace: JWT authentication is optional: auth.headers() returns Ok(None) when no jwt_secret is configured (auth.rs:96-98), yet Engine API calls proceed without authentication. Blobs from unauthenticated EL connections are marked ExecutionLayer origin and skip KZG verification (store.rs:2185-2200). Misconfiguration enables spoofed EL to inject unverified blobs.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Operator starts Grandine without --jwt-secret flag. Attacker performs MITM or DNS poisoning on localhost EL connection, serves malicious blobs via engine_getBlobsV1. Blobs skip cryptographic verification and are accepted into fork choice.
